name: Brazil Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Bottom layer: Mix together 1/2 cup brown sugar, 1 cup flour, and 1/4 teaspoon salt with 1/2 cup butter. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Second layer: Combine 3/4 cup brown sugar, 2 eggs, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 1 cup of the brazil nuts, 1/2 cup coconut flakes, and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract. Spread over the bottom layer. Bake for 30 minutes or a little longer until set.
4. Top layer: Melt chocolate with hot water. Stir in 1/4 cup corn syrup and 1 tablespoon water. Spread on top of the baked layers and sprinkle with the remaining brazil nuts.
